betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§fThe §6ME Pattern Terminal §fencodes crafting and processing recipes onto §6Encoded Patterns§f. These patterns are used by §6Molecular Assemblers §ffor automated crafting.

§fTwo modes:
§bCrafting Pattern: §fstandard shaped/shapeless recipes
§bProcessing Pattern: §fmachine recipes (input → output)

§fPlace a blank pattern in the terminal, set the recipe, and encode it. Insert the encoded pattern into a Molecular Assembler or Interface.

§aTip: §fProcessing patterns are the backbone of AE2 automation. Encode every machine recipe you use.
